Pregnant or Parenting Teen?
Discover your strengths. Set goals. Achieve your dreams.
The Adolescent Family Life Program (AFLP) in Riverside County is here to help you and other young parents grow into the best people—and best parents—you can be. AFLP is a VOLUNTARY and FREE case management program for young people who are:
Parenting or expecting a baby.
Under age 22.
Live in Riverside County.
AFLP focuses on positive youth development and provides one-on-one support and resources in the following areas and more:
Family planning and safer sex.
Health and health care.
Education and work.
Healthy relationships.
More information about AFLP.
To learn more about the AFLP, please complete the referral form and contact:
Maternal, Child Adolescent Health Program
